_comment: Per-deploy IdP template. Deployed under web/auth/_config/ and mirrored to kv `_config/oidc/default` at release (auth-domain-plan §9 / config_mirror in reloadDeployment). The live, runtime-mutable client registry oidc.provider() actually reads is `_oidc/config/{name}` (admin-managed, X-Rove-Scope: __auth__) — operators add/remove RP clients without a redeploy. This file documents the production dashboard clients (the Fork-B RP shims, step 3-6 part 2) and serves as the deploy-mirror test vector.
